title: Pathway to Independence - an interview with Giulia Paci.
abstract: Giulia Paci is a Postdoctoral Fellow at the Laboratory for Molecular Cell Biology at University College London, UK, supported by Yanlan Mao and Buzz Baum, who is interested in how developmental programmes respond to and buffer mechanical stresses. Giulia is part of the third cohort of fellows in Development's Pathway to Independence programme, which aims to support the transition to a group leader. We met Giulia on Teams to discuss physics, mechanics and comics.
